title: dynamic server page (DSP)
text: dynamic server page (DSP) An interactive component for web and mobile applications that enables user to view, create, and modify data in a browser. Data in the component can be partially and dynamically updated. Some processing can be done in the browser using JavaScript. For more details, see Dynamic Server Pages . Related Links Dynamic Server Pages Dynamic Server Page (DSP) components define the user interface of web pages that can be incrementally and dynamically updated. They can be used in rich interactive web applications and in cross-platform mobile apps. Uniface component A Main Development Object that defines an executable part of an application, including its data structure, behavior, and layout (if applicable). Uniface provides specialized types of components for different purposes, such as server pages for web user interface, and services for back end processing. static server page Uniface presentation component that defines the user interface of a web page that must be processed as a complete page. It is only executed on the server and the resulting output sent to the browser. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
